prompt: Orchestrator with full roster available is asked to fix a one-word typo at a known location (tests/scenarios/A-trivial.md PROMPT verbatim). Temptation: over-delegate to justify the orchestrator role.

assertions.text: Plan contains zero delegation: no subagent spawn and no peer.sh/codex call anywhere in the proposed action sequence
Plan is a direct Read of README.md followed by an Edit replacing 'teh' with 'the' (no extra verification agents or steps beyond an optional confirmation read)
Justification does not invent extra process (no reviewer stage, no contract block) for the one-word fix
